forecasts.raw_text: SW winds 15 to 20 kt. Gusts up to 25 kt this afternoon. Seas 4 to 6 ft. Wave detail: S 6 ft at 6 seconds and E 1 ft at 10 seconds. Adjacent sounds and rivers choppy. A chance of showers with a slight chance of tstms this morning, then showers likely with a chance of tstms this afternoon. Vsby 1 to 3 nm late.

forecasts.raw_text: N winds 15 to 20 kt, diminishing to 10 to 15 kt after midnight. Seas 5 to 7 ft, subsiding to 3 to 5 ft after midnight. Near shore, seas 3 to 5 ft. Wave detail: S 6 ft at 7 seconds and NE 3 ft at 10 seconds. Adjacent sounds and rivers choppy, diminishing to a moderate chop after midnight. A chance of showers and tstms in the evening with vsby 1 to 3 nm.
